findings.description: The source explicitly states that when a Class is passed to LoggerManager#get, the FQCN becomes the logger name: "LoggerManager#getメソッドでクラスを指定した場合は、FQCNがロガー名となる。" This is decision-necessary information because it explains why nameRegex patterns like `nablarch\.core\.validation\..*` correctly match class-based loggers. The knowledge file only says the logger name is the argument to LoggerManager#get without explaining the FQCN conversion.
findings.source_evidence: 「LoggerManager#getメソッドでクラスを指定した場合は、FQCNがロガー名となる。」(source section ロガー設定, before the code example)

findings.description: The `level` property appears as a row in the property table in s6 content ("ログレベル（LogLevel列挙型の名称、指定したレベル以上を全て出力）") and in the configuration code example (`writer.appFile.level=INFO`), but `level` is absent from s6's hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `writer.appFile.level=INFO` with comment "LogLevel列挙型の名称を指定する。ここで指定したレベル以上のログを全て出力する。"
